$comment: Adapter catalogue for AGENTS.md provisioning (agent-instructions feature). AGENTS.md is the always-present real file; adapters are opt-in relative symlinks the user selects at setup. Extend this list to add runtimes without editing skill prose.

adapters.notes: Claude Code reads CLAUDE.md; symlink keeps one source of truth.
Warp reads AGENTS.md natively since 2025; only symlink WARP.md for teams on the legacy filename.
